command: bash -lc CARGO_TERM_COLOR=never greentic-component build --manifest /projects/ai/greentic-ng/component-llm-openai/component.manifest.json --no-flow --json 2>&1 | python3 -c 'import json, pathlib, sys; out = pathlib.Path(sys.argv[1]); lines = sys.stdin.read().splitlines(); start = next(i for i, line in enumerate(lines) if line.lstrip().startswith("{")); payload = "\n".join(lines[start:]); obj = json.loads(payload); out.write_text(json.dumps(obj))' "/tmp/gtest-9aliFB/build_component.json"
